rows.currentOwner: CMS article SEO JSON-LD preferred; visible-content compatibility fallback remains in frontend
rows.desiredOwner: CMS article SEO JSON-LD or backend seo.surface.v1
rows.authorityRule: Article JSON-LD fallback may render only from visible article content and remains a compatibility wrapper that blocks article SEO/GEO expansion.
rows.blocksWhen: Article JSON-LD fallback is treated as final SEO/GEO authority or emits hidden schema not grounded in visible article content.

rows.currentOwner: frontend_gateway_fallback for emergency personality detail projection
rows.desiredOwner: CMS personality projection and public surface bundle
rows.authorityRule: Personality fallback projection must remain noindex/schema-suppressed and cannot carry career, graph, recommendation, scenario, or local content-pack claims.
rows.blocksWhen: Frontend personality fallback projection renders public schema, career direction, recommendation, graph, scenario, or local content-pack claims.

hardRules: Article JSON-LD fallback cannot silently become accepted final authority
Article JSON-LD must be backend/CMS-owned or visible-content deterministic
Personality fallback cannot carry career / graph / recommendation claims
Personality fallback must remain noindex/schema-suppressed if used
CMS personality projection must be preferred when available
